name: Icing for Iowa Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Can substitute 1/4 cup milk with Hershey's syrup to taste, but not as good as above.
In a saucepan, combine the butter, sugar, and evaporated milk. Bring to boil.
Boil for one minute. Stir in the chocolate morsels and continue heating until melted.
The frosting will be thin and glossy, but it will set up on the brownies.
Frost the brownies immediately with a wet knife. (In hot weather, place in the refrigerator for about 20 minutes to aid in setting up).
